---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .projects-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c2d6b 0%, #1a56db 50%, #3b82f6 100%);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .projects-hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%; left: -50%;
    width: 200%; height: 200%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 30px 30px;
    animation: drift 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes drift {
    from { transform: translate(0, 0); }
    to { transform: translate(30px, 30px); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(25px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .projects-hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .projects-hero h1 {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out;
  }

  .projects-hero p {
    color: #bfdbfe;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.2s both;
  }

  .projects-body {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .project-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.08);
    border-left: 4px solid #dbeafe;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease-out both;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .project-card::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; right: 0;
    width: 80px; height: 80px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 50%, rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.04) 50%);
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
  }

  .project-card:hover::after {
    width: 120px; height: 120px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 50%, rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.08) 50%);
  }

  .project-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .project-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
  .project-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
  .project-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.55s; }
  .project-card:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.7s; }
  .project-card:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.85s; }

  .project-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.15);
    border-left: 4px solid #1a56db;
  }

  .project-card h3 {
    color: #1e40af;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .project-card:hover h3 { color: #1a56db; }

  .project-date {
    color: #64748b;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
    display: block;
  }

  .project-card p {
    color: #475569;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .project-impact {
    background: #eff6ff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .project-impact:hover {
    background: #1a56db;
    color: #fff;
    transform: scale(1.02);
  }

  .project-impact:hover .impact-number,
  .project-impact:hover .impact-label { color: #fff; }

  .impact-number {
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #1a56db;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .impact-label {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: #475569;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background-color: #dbeafe;
    color: #1e40af;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    margin-right: 0.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .tag:hover {
    background-color: #1a56db;
    color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05);
  }

  .section-divider {
    text-align: center;
    color: #94a3b8;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    margin: 2rem 0 1rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-weight: 600;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease-out both;
  }
</style>

<!-- Projects Hero -->
<div class="projects-hero">
  <div class="projects-hero-content">
    <h1>Projects</h1>
    <p>GTM analytics, customer targeting, uplift modeling & growth experimentation</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="projects-body">
<div class="section-divider">🏀 Sports Analytics</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h3><a href="projects/clippers-ticket-intelligence.html" style="color: #1e40af; text-decoration: none;">Clippers Ticket Intelligence</a></h3>
  <span class="project-date">Side Project · April 2026</span>
  <p>Analyzed secondary market resale data for every LA Clippers home game this season to identify pricing gaps and proposed three AI-native strategies for the ticket sales pipeline – predictive face-value pricing, AI-scored lead lists, and resale-signal churn detection for season members.</p>
  <div class="project-impact">
    <span class="impact-number">16x</span>
    <span class="impact-label">Resale price spread between Lakers and Wizards matchups</span>
  </div>
  <span class="tag">Pricing Strategy</span><span class="tag">Sports Analytics</span><span class="tag">Churn Detection</span><span class="tag">AI/ML</span><span class="tag">Revenue Optimization</span>
</div>
  <div class="section-divider">🎯 Targeting & Growth</div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Up-Sell Ad Campaign for Intuit QuickBooks</h3>
    <span class="project-date">UCSD · Customer Analytics · Dec 2025</span>
    <p>Built an ML model on clickstream data of 1M users to identify causal relationships between product features and customer engagement. Used uplift modeling to inform a second-wave targeting campaign.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">$380K</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Profit generated from targeted second-wave campaign</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">Uplift Modeling</span><span class="tag">Causal Inference</span><span class="tag">Python</span><span class="tag">Clickstream</span><span class="tag">Campaign Optimization</span>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Predicting Churn & Design of Experiments</h3>
    <span class="project-date">UCSD · Customer Analytics</span>
    <p>Developed churn prediction models and designed experiments to test retention strategies. Applied A/B testing frameworks to measure the effectiveness of intervention tactics on at-risk customer segments.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">🔬</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Experimental design to validate retention strategies before full rollout</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">Churn Prediction</span><span class="tag">A/B Testing</span><span class="tag">Experiment Design</span><span class="tag">Python</span><span class="tag">Retention</span>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Personalization for Pentathlon</h3>
    <span class="project-date">UCSD · Customer Analytics</span>
    <p>Built personalized recommendation and targeting models to optimize customer engagement across multiple touchpoints. Leveraged customer segmentation to tailor messaging and offers for different user cohorts.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">🎯</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Multi-channel personalization across customer lifecycle</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">Personalization</span><span class="tag">Segmentation</span><span class="tag">Recommendation Systems</span><span class="tag">Python</span>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider">📊 Measurement & Attribution</div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Measuring Uplift for Creative Gaming</h3>
    <span class="project-date">UCSD · Customer Analytics</span>
    <p>Applied uplift modeling techniques to measure the incremental impact of creative ad variations on player acquisition and engagement in a gaming context. Quantified which creative elements drove true lift vs. organic conversion.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">📈</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Isolated true creative impact from organic conversion</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">Uplift Modeling</span><span class="tag">Incrementality</span><span class="tag">Creative Testing</span><span class="tag">Python</span>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Market Sentiment & Brand Perception Analysis</h3>
    <span class="project-date">UCSD · Jan 2026</span>
    <p>Analyzed Twitter and digital news sentiment to evaluate shifts in brand perception. Discovered that trend-driven brands experienced faster and stronger short-term sentiment changes compared to established brands — key insight for brand marketing teams.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">🔍</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Quantified sentiment velocity differences between brand archetypes</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">NLP</span><span class="tag">Sentiment Analysis</span><span class="tag">Brand Analytics</span><span class="tag">Twitter API</span><span class="tag">Python</span>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider">💼 Professional — GTM & Revenue Ops</div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>GTM Revenue Dashboards & Pipeline Forecasting — NuSummit</h3>
    <span class="project-date">2023 – 2025</span>
    <p>Led design of GTM & revenue dashboards for enterprise clients in financial services. Built pipeline forecasting models in SQL/Snowflake from Salesforce data to track lead-to-close efficiency and improve quarterly revenue predictability.</p>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.8rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <div class="project-impact" style="flex: 1; min-width: 140px;">
        <span class="impact-number">20%</span>
        <span class="impact-label">Campaign ROI improvement</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-impact" style="flex: 1; min-width: 140px;">
        <span class="impact-number">12%</span>
        <span class="impact-label">Conversion rate lift</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">SQL</span><span class="tag">Snowflake</span><span class="tag">Salesforce</span><span class="tag">Tableau</span><span class="tag">Pipeline Forecasting</span><span class="tag">AWS</span>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Multi-Touch Attribution & Channel Optimization — BIA</h3>
    <span class="project-date">2021 – 2023</span>
    <p>Developed a Multi-Touch Attribution framework to determine ROAS and guide channel-level spend decisions. Optimized SQL-based reporting and conducted funnel analysis and A/B testing in HubSpot and Salesforce.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">70%</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Dashboard latency reduction through query optimization</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">Multi-Touch Attribution</span><span class="tag">ROAS</span><span class="tag">SQL</span><span class="tag">HubSpot</span><span class="tag">A/B Testing</span>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <h3>Fitech Case — End-to-End Customer Analytics</h3>
    <span class="project-date">UCSD · Customer Analytics</span>
    <p>Completed a comprehensive fintech case study integrating targeting, segmentation, churn prediction, and lifetime value modeling. Delivered a full-funnel analytics strategy from acquisition through retention.</p>
    <div class="project-impact">
      <span class="impact-number">🏦</span>
      <span class="impact-label">Full-funnel GTM analytics strategy for a fintech product</span>
    </div>
    <span class="tag">Customer LTV</span><span class="tag">Segmentation</span><span class="tag">Churn</span><span class="tag">GTM Strategy</span><span class="tag">Python</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
